converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Ephim Fogel papers
Fogel, Ephim, 1920-1992.
14-12-2711
1.9 cubic feet. 1.9 cubic feet.
1940-1989. Correspondence, subject files, a volume, and a photographic negative. Correspondence and subject files pertaining chiefly to Fogel's career as Professor of English at Cornell. Collection material in English 2248627
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M.E. Warren
Date completed:
October 1994
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, March 2004
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, March 2016
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of English, Cornell University.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence and subject files pertaining chiefly to Fogel's career at Cornell. Letters and documents touch on departmental policies and procedures; promotion and tenure discussions; recommendations for students and colleagues; lecture notes, reading lists, syllabi. Special files concern Fogel's work in creating the Paul Gottschalk Memoral Lecture series honoring his deceased colleague. Materials relating to Fogel's own scholarly projects include substantial files on his collaboration with David V. Erdman in editing Evidence for Authorship for the Cornell University Press. Also, a volume of the complete works of Edmund Spenser owned and annotated by both Fogel and William Strunk; a photographic negative of a bookplate honoring John Alban Finch, and letter from Fogel to Elizabeth Murphy concerning the Finch Fund and bookplate.
Cite As:
Ephim Fogel papers, #14-12-2711. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Box 4 restricted to the permission of the University Archivist.
English literature -- Study and teaching. Strunk, William, 1869-1946. Erdman, David V. Gottschalk, Paul, 1939-1977. Finch, John Alban, 1929-1967. Murphy, Elizabeth. Cornell University Press Cornell University -- : Faculty. Cornell University. English Department Paul Gottschalk Memorial Lectures
